summary: Iteration 87 - UI/UX Unification Testing: Beach Mode Background & On-Demand Layout Repair. All requested features verified: Earnings Dashboard uses isBeach check for bg-black background in Beach Mode, On-Demand page matches Gallery structure (p-4 max-w-6xl mx-auto pb-24), NO sticky header, NO fixed footer, Save button in header row, uses Card components.

earnings_dashboard_beach_mode_background.details: Earnings Dashboard background color is rgb(0, 0, 0) (BLACK) when Beach Mode is active. Code uses isBeach ? 'bg-black' : 'bg-zinc-900'

earnings_dashboard_isBeach_check.details: EarningsDashboard.js Line 355-356: isBeach = theme === 'beach', mainBgClass = isLight ? 'bg-gray-50' : isBeach ? 'bg-black' : 'bg-zinc-900'

on_demand_container_structure.details: Container has classes: p-4 max-w-6xl mx-auto pb-24 - matches Gallery structure exactly

on_demand_no_sticky_header.details: 0 sticky elements found on On-Demand Settings page

on_demand_no_fixed_footer.details: No fixed bottom save bar - Save button is in header row at y=26

on_demand_save_button_in_header.details: Save button found with data-testid='save-settings-btn' at position x=1462, y=26 (in header row, same line as title)

on_demand_card_components.details: Found 11 Card-like components (rounded-xl) matching Gallery style

on_demand_loading_state.details: Loading state uses h-64 spinner matching Gallery (Line 204)

gallery_page_structure_reference.details: Gallery page classes: p-4 max-w-6xl mx-auto - On-Demand matches this structure

theme_classes_beach_mode.details: OnDemandSettingsPage.js Lines 55-61: isBeach check implemented for cardBg, sectionBg with beach mode variants

critical_code_review_comments: EarningsDashboard.js correctly implements isBeach check for Beach Mode background (bg-black)
OnDemandSettingsPage.js matches Gallery structure: p-4 max-w-6xl mx-auto pb-24
Save button correctly placed in header row (not fixed footer)
No sticky header or fixed footer elements on On-Demand page
Theme classes (textPrimary, textSecondary, cardBg) include beach mode variants
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user with God Mode
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI/UX Unification verified: Earnings Dashboard uses isBeach check for bg-black background, On-Demand page matches Gallery structure (p-4 max-w-6xl mx-auto pb-24), Save button in header row, no sticky/fixed elements. Beach Mode theme working correctly across pages.
